sql_array: UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrNull('InvalidDateFormat') WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT event_date, parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrNull('2023-10-26T18:30:00Z') AS parsed_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrNull('2023-10-27T10:00:00Z') AS new_date UNION ALL SELECT parseDateTime64InJodaSyntaxOrNull('InvalidFormat') AS new_date;
